name: nemotron-chat
description: NVIDIA Nemotron AI chat and coding assistant for VSCode

commands.title: Open in Editor Tab (can be moved to a separate window)

nemotron.models.description: Model list shown in the '/model' command. Add or edit any model IDs your API key can access.

nemotron.systemPrompt.default: You are an AI assistant developed by NVIDIA. Be helpful, clear, and concise. Use markdown code blocks with language tags for code. Respond in the same language the user writes in.

nemotron.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

nemotron.enableThinking.description: Enable and display the thinking (reasoning) process

nemotron.enableTools.description: Allow the AI to use tools that list, read, and write workspace files

nemotron.enableMemory.description: Long-term memory: let the AI save/recall lessons, preferences, and conventions across sessions (stored in .nemotron/memory) so it stops repeating the same mistakes

nemotron.maxMemoryChars.description: Maximum characters of long-term memory injected into the prompt. When exceeded, the most recently created memories are kept first

nemotron.autoMode.description: ⚡ Auto-approve mode: perform file edits and command execution without confirmation (use with caution)

nemotron.autoApproveWrites.description: Automatically approve file writes (write_file/edit_file) without confirmation (use with caution)

nemotron.autoApproveCommands.description: Automatically approve terminal commands (run_command) without confirmation (caution: arbitrary commands will be executed)

nemotron.autoContext.description: Automatically attach the active file and selection info when sending a message

nemotron.maxRpm.description: Maximum API requests per minute (RPM). Waits automatically when exceeded. 0 = no limit

nemotron.maxToolIterations.description: Maximum tool-call round trips per request. When reached, you are asked whether to continue

nemotron.showDiff.description: Show a native diff preview when approving file changes

nemotron.persistentShell.description: Use a persistent shell session for run_command (keeps cd / virtualenv state)

nemotron.maxContextChars.description: Maximum conversation context characters sent to the model. When exceeded, the oldest messages are dropped first

name.description: sub-agent name (the AI calls it by this name)

description.description: Specialty description (used by the AI to decide delegation)

type.description: chat (default): conversational LLM / image: text-to-image generation (genai endpoint, result saved to a file)

default.name: reasoner
default.description: Specialized in hard reasoning, math, and complex code
default.systemPrompt: Reason carefully step by step to reach an accurate conclusion. Use language tags in code blocks.

default.name: super
default.description: Balanced general purpose (summarization, translation, general coding)
default.systemPrompt: Answer concisely and accurately. Use language tags in code blocks.

default.name: nano
default.description: Lightweight and fast tasks (classification, short summaries)

default.name: imager
default.description: Specialized in text-to-image generation. Write a detailed English prompt in TASK. Results are saved to .nemotron/images/

nemotron.agents.description: List of sub-agents the AI can delegate to via the run_agent tool. Only NVIDIA-published models (nvidia/...) are allowed. Use '/agents → Update from NVIDIA model list' to sync with the live catalog

nemotron.restoreLastSession.description: Automatically restore the last session when VSCode starts

nemotron.godotPath.description: Path to the Godot executable (fallback for GDScript syntax checking). Leave empty to auto-detect godot/godot4 on PATH

untrustedWorkspaces.description: This extension reads and writes workspace files, so it only works in trusted folders.
